banner_rules.applies_to: any Next.js client JS bundle body

source.principle: Next.js App Router bootstrap assigns window.next = {version: __NEXT_VERSION, appDir: true} at runtime. The version comes from process.env.__NEXT_VERSION which is inlined by the build. This is the canonical version-disclosure for App Router (Next 13+). Pages Router uses a different pattern caught by retire.js fingerprints id 1119-1120.
validated_against: bookingcare.vn /_next/static/.../framework-a71af9b1c76f668e.js -> n.version="X.Y.Z" (Pages Router shape via retire.js)
